input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.2.1.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.2.1.1
            TITLE: each team must submit an electrical system form (esf) with a clearly structured

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.2.1.1: Each team must submit an Electrical System Form (ESF) with a clearly structured
EV.2.1.1 Each team must submit an Electrical System Form (ESF) with a clearly structured 
documentation of the entire vehicle electrical system (including control and Tractive System). 
Submission and approval of the ESF does not mean that the vehicle will automatically pass 
Electrical Technical Inspection with the described items / parts.

final_answer: Each team must submit an Electrical System Form (ESF) with a clearly structured documentation of the entire vehicle electrical system (including control and Tractive System). Submission and approval of the ESF does not mean that the vehicle will automatically pass Electrical Technical Inspection with the described items / parts.
